transcript:
Agent: Yeah, what do you need?
Caller: Um, hi, I was told to call back about my MRI results?
Agent: OK what's your name?
Caller: Patricia Gomez.
Agent: Hold on... I don't see anything here. Are you sure you were told to call this number?
Caller: Yes, the doctor's office told me to call for my results.
Agent: Well I don't have anything. You probably called the wrong department. Try calling back and pressing a different option.
Caller: Can you transfer me?
Agent: I'm not able to do transfers right now. Just call back.
Caller: That's really frustrating, I've been trying to get these results for—
Agent: Ma'am, I told you, I can't help. Call back. Bye.
